mapper.select:
SELECT s.stock_id, s.stock_qty, i.code, i.name, i.type, i.unit, i.safe, i.item_status, f.facility_name FROM stock s JOIN item i ON s.item_num = i.item_num
JOIN facility f ON f.facility_num = s.facility_num ORDER BY s.stock_id DESC

SELECT s.stock_id, s.stock_qty, i.code, i.name, i.type, i.unit, i.safe, i.item_status, f.facility_name FROM stock s JOIN item i ON s.item_num = i.item_num JOIN facility f ON f.facility_num = s.facility_num
AND upper(i.type) = 'EQUIP'
AND upper(i.type) = 'PRODUCT'
AND upper(i.type) = 'SEMIPRODUCT'
AND (upper(i.type) = 'RAW' OR upper(i.type) = 'MATERIAL')
AND upper(i.name) LIKE ('%' || upper(#{keyword}) || '%')
ORDER BY s.stock_id DESC

SELECT i.CODE, i.NAME, i.TYPE, i.UNIT, i.iTEM_NUM FROM item i LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT ITEM_NUM FROM ITEM MINUS SELECT ITEM_NUM FROM STOCK ) num ON i.item_num = num.item_num WHERE UPPER(NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{_parameter}) || '%'

SELECT s.stock_id, s.stock_qty, i.code, i.name, i.type, i.unit, i.safe, i.item_status, f.facility_name, l.lot_code, l.expiry_date, l.lot_date FROM stock s JOIN item i ON s.item_num = i.item_num JOIN facility f ON f.facility_num = s.facility_num JOIN LOT l ON l.item_num = i.item_num where s.stock_id = #{stock_id}
